steps.observed: Topic selection displayed with 6 category buttons

steps.expected: 10 individual lectures OR 6 broad topic categories
steps.observed: 6 broad topic categories shown: Advanced Topics (25 questions), Assembly Basics (10 questions), Control Flow (10 questions), Data Representation (5 questions), I/O Operations (2 questions), Procedures (7 questions)

assertions.title: Mistake Pattern Detection

steps.expected: Questions include code-tracing/output-prediction types with text input
steps.observed: Found XCHG instruction question with text input field: 'If AX contains 1234h and BX contains 5678h, what are the values after executing XCHG AX, BX?'
Question: 'What segment register is used by default for [BX + 5]? How to override to CS?' - text input field available

steps.action: Check for review material links after incorrect answers
steps.expected: Mistake patterns identified with remediation links
steps.observed: After incorrect answers, review material links appear: 'MOV instruction basics', 'Register classes and naming', 'XCHG instruction', 'Basic register operations', 'Segment override prefix', 'Default segments'

steps.action: Verify text input is used for code-tracing questions
steps.expected: SCASB, XCHG, CALL/RET questions have text input
steps.observed: XCHG question and segment override question both had text input fields (placeholder: 'Type your answer here...')

assertions.issues: Bug observed: Answers marked as 'Correct answer: ...' but then shown as 'Incorrect. The correct answer was: ...' - same value shown for both correct and incorrect. This appears to be a string comparison bug (possibly spacing/formatting mismatch).

steps.observed: Report displayed with: 10 Questions, 4 Correct, 6 Incorrect, 40% Accuracy, Completed in 6m 36s

steps.expected: Report shows accuracy and remediation recommendations
steps.observed: Report shows: Areas for Improvement (concepts: mov-instruction 33%, general-purpose-registers 50%, register-classes 50%, flag-register 50%), Performance by Topic (Assembly Basics 4/10 = 40%), Remediation Recommendations: MOV instruction basics, Register classes and naming, Basic register operations

steps.expected: Session contains correctCount, duration, topics, itemsCompleted
steps.observed: Session record: {correctCount: 4, duration: 396, endedAt: '2026-03-31T10:49:49.486Z', id: 1, itemsCompleted: 10, mode: 'diagnostic', startedAt: '2026-03-31T10:43:12.951Z', topics: ['Assembly Basics'], userId: 'db6cb2e7-a604-41cf-8a93-7070483f0541'}

evidence.network: n/a - IndexedDB query via browser eval

frictions.description: agent-browser click command with @ref syntax not working consistently - had to use 'find text ... click' instead
frictions.resolution: Used 'find role button click --name' or 'find text ... click' as workaround

frictions.description: eval command with string arguments having quoting issues in PowerShell environment
frictions.resolution: Used String.fromCharCode() to construct strings when direct quotes failed

summary: Tested 4 assertions (P3-DIAG-001, P3-DIAG-003, P3-DIAG-004, P3-DIAG-006): All PASS. Topic selection shows 6 broad categories (not 10 individual lectures). Text input fields confirmed for code-tracing questions (XCHG, segment override). View Report button displays accuracy and recommendations correctly. Diagnostic session persisted to IndexedDB with correct data including duration matching report (396 seconds = 6m 36s). One minor bug noted: answers sometimes show as 'Correct answer: X' but then 'Incorrect. The correct answer was: X' - likely a string comparison issue.
